items.title: 苹果在印度生产的iPhone比例已达25%，而中国的生产也在减少，彭博社报道。
items.title_en: Apple now makes 25% of iPhones in India amid China shift, Bloomberg reports

items.title: 德国出版商拒绝苹果的修订应用跟踪规则，呼吁反垄断罚款
items.title_en: German publishers reject Apple’s revised app tracking rules, urge antitrust fine

items.title: Anthropic被美国国防部选为人工智能合作伙伴，如今却被禁用，专家们开始担忧。
items.summary: Anthropic与亚马逊和帕拉提尔的合作帮助其在DOD取得了进展，但其被列入黑名单引起了许多行业专家的关注。
items.title_en: Anthropic was the Pentagon's choice for AI. Now it's banned and experts are worried
items.summary_en: Anthropic's partnerships with Amazon and Palantir helped it make inroads into the DOD, and its blacklisting is concerning to many industry experts.

items.title: OpenAI将收购安全性初创公司Promptfoo以更好地保护AI代理
items.summary: Promptfoo团队将加入Sam Altman领导的OpenAI，技术将整合到AI代理平台Frontier中。
items.title_en: OpenAI to buy cybersecurity startup Promptfoo to better safeguard AI agents
items.summary_en: Promptfoo's team will join Sam Altman-led OpenAI, and its technology will be integrated into the Frontier platform for AI agents.

items.title: 微软推出高价 Office 等级，Copilot作为其试图通过 AI 增强销售的努力
items.summary: 微软365E7包含Copilot，以及身份、管理和安全功能，这些功能可能会让更多的企业采用AI。
items.title_en: Microsoft adds higher-priced Office tier with Copilot as it tries to juice sales with AI
items.summary_en: Microsoft 365 E7 comes with Copilot, as well as identity, management and security features that might make more businesses adopt AI.

items.title: 英伟达支持AI数据中心初创公司Nscale，后者估值达14.6亿美元

items.title_en: Nvidia backs AI data center startup Nscale as it hits $14.6 billion valuation
items.summary_en: Nscale has become a key player in the AI infrastructure buildout

items.title: 中国消费者通胀率达三年高点，生产者通胀率缓解
items.summary: 中国的消费价格指数（CPI）在三个多年来首次出现了大幅上涨，长假期间的消费热潮推动了消费支出。
items.title_en: China consumer inflation hits three-year high as producer deflation eases
items.summary_en: China's consumer inflation recorded the biggest jump in more than three years, as an extended holiday bolstered spending.

items.title: 伊朗称石油封锁将持续直到袭击停止，特朗普威胁要加大力度打击。

items.title: 美国股指期货下跌，受华尔街上涨的影响，华尔街上涨是因为人们认为伊朗战争可能很快结束。
items.title_en: US stock futures dip after Wall St gains on hopes Iran war could end soon

items.title: 石油价格暴跌10%，特朗普警告称，如果伊朗封锁霍尔木兹海峡，美国将对伊朗进行“二十倍”的打击。
items.summary: 石油价格暴跌，随着特朗普警告称，如果伊朗试图阻止霍尔木兹海峡石油流通，伊朗将遭受“二十倍的打击”。
items.title_en: Oil plunges 10% as Trump warns to hit Iran 'twenty times harder' if it blockades Strait of Hormuz
items.summary_en: Oil prices plunged after Trump warned that Tehran would be hit "twenty times harder" if it attempted to halt oil flows through the Strait of Hormuz.

items.title: 亚洲市场反弹，油价暴跌，随着特朗普表示伊朗战争可能很快结束
items.summary: 亚太市场从周一的暴跌中恢复，油价下跌和华尔街反弹带来希望。
items.title_en: Asia markets rebound as oil plunges after Trump signals Iran war might end 'soon'
items.summary_en: Asia-Pacific markets rebounded from Monday's rout after oil prices fell and Wall Street bounced back.

items.title: 特朗普称伊朗战争将很快结束，预测油价将下降
items.summary: 美国股市指数在白天一度上涨，据初步报告，美国总统唐纳德·特朗普表示他认为伊朗战争已经基本结束。
items.title_en: Trump says Iran war will end 'very soon,' predicts lower oil prices
items.summary_en: U.S. stock market indexes rose earlier in the day after an initial report that President Donald Trump said he believed the Iran war was largely finished.

items.title: 第七名美国服役人员在伊朗战争中被杀的士兵被确认为是上士本杰明·彭宁顿（Sgt. Benjamin Pennington）。
items.summary: 肯塔基州格伦代尔的26岁男子Pennington在3月1日沙特阿拉伯的普里ンス·苏丹空军基地遭到伊朗袭击时受伤，于周日去世。
items.title_en: Seventh U.S. service member killed in Iran war identified as Sgt. Benjamin Pennington
items.summary_en: Pennington, 26, from Glendale, Kentucky, was wounded on March 1 during an Iranian strike at Prince Sultan Air Base in Saudi Arabia. He died on Sunday.

items.title: 霍尔木兹海峡关闭可能对另一个能源市场造成更大的打击。
items.summary: 全球液化天然气约有20%通过海峡。
items.title_en: There's another energy market that may get hit harder than oil by Strait of Hormuz closure
items.summary_en: Roughly 20% of global liquefied natural gas flows through the Strait.

items.title: 10年期国债收益率下跌，随着石油价格反弹
items.summary: 10年期国债收益率最初上升，然后在周一回落，因为原油价格先升破100美元一桶，后又下跌。
items.title_en: 10-year Treasury yield falls as oil reverses spike
items.summary_en: The 10-year Treasury yield initially moved higher before pulling back on Monday as oil prices at first moved past $100 a barrel, then later declined.

items.title: 油价飙升至100美元，人们开始担心会出现1970年代式的通货膨胀加失业。这种威胁有多大?
items.summary: 高通胀和缓慢增长构成了双重威胁，降息和政府开支等措施只会加剧通胀。
items.title_en: Fears of 1970s-style stagflation arise with oil spike to $100. How big a threat is it?
items.summary_en: High inflation and slow growth present a double threat, as measures like interest rate cuts and government spending only aggravate inflation.

items.title: G7能源部长将于周二上午举行会议，讨论释放石油储备。

items.summary_en: Prediction markets are facing backlash over bets related to war, with Polymarket recently archiving some predictions on nuclear detonation.

items.summary_en: Energy analysts warned that oil prices could continue to rise in response to the war in the Middle East.

items.summary_en: China typically combines January and February trade data to smooth distortions from the shifting Lunar New Year holiday.

items.title_en: Elon Musk's xAI wants to build a power plant in Mississippi. Regulators plan a key meeting on Election Day
items.summary_en: The NAACP has accused Mississippi regulators of rushing a meeting to approve xAI plans for a massive, methane-burning power plant in Southaven.

items.title_en: Top permitting-reform Republican, Democratic senators meeting as talks thaw: API chief
items.summary_en: Speeding up the federal permitting process is a top priority for the energy and tech industries.

items.title: 百万美元收入者已经停止为2026年社会保障缴费
items.summary: 社会保障缴费上限在2026年为184,500美元。一些高收入人士已经停止为今年的计划支付。
items.title_en: Million-dollar earners have already stopped paying into Social Security for 2026
items.summary_en: The Social Security payroll tax is capped at $184,500 in 2026. Some high earners have already stopped paying into the program for the year.

items.title: 美国联邦调查局(FBI)获得了2020年亚利桑那州马里科帕县选举结果审计的记录，共和党人表示
items.summary: 唐纳德·特朗普总统称赞了FBI获得的记录。他一直声称自己在2020年大选中被欺骗，错失胜利。
items.title_en: FBI obtains records of Arizona Senate audit of 2020 Maricopa County election results, Republican says
items.summary_en: President Donald Trump touted the fact that the records had been obtained by the FBI. He long has claimed he was cheated out of victory in the 2020 election.

items.title: 蓝色天空CEO杰伊格拉伯（Jay Graber）将暂时离职，前WordPress母公司首席执行官托尼施耐德（Toni Schneider）被任命为临时CEO。
items.summary: 蓝色天空（Bluesky）是由Jack Dorsey于2019年在Twitter上创建的，随后在Elon Musk收购Twitter后作为X的替代品而走红。
items.title_en: Bluesky CEO Jay Graber stepping back, former WordPress parent chief Toni Schneider named interim boss
items.summary_en: Bluesky was born out of Twitter by Jack Dorsey in 2019 and rose to popularity as an alternative to X after Elon Musk's acquisition.

items.title_en: Oracle is building yesterday’s data centers with tomorrow’s debt
items.summary_en: The OpenAI deal fallout exposes the fundamental danger of being the most leveraged player in a market where the chip cycle moves faster than the concrete dries.

items.title_en: Ticketmaster parent Live Nation reaches settlement with Department of Justice over antitrust concerns
items.summary_en: Live Nation, which owns Ticketmaster, reached a settlement with the Department of Justice over antitrust concerns.

items.title: Anthropic因 Pentagon 黑名单起诉特朗普政府
items.summary: 诉讼称Anthropic遭受了不可弥补的损害，可能损失数十亿美元。

items.summary_en: The lawsuit says Anthropic is being harmed "irreparably" and could lose hundreds of millions of dollars.

items.title: K型经济给女性带来了压力，低薪和高成本减少了她们的支出
items.summary: 女性面临着较低的工资和日常用品价格上涨带来的压力，导致K型经济进一步扩大，女性的消费支出减少。
items.title_en: K-shaped economy puts pressure on women, as lower pay and higher costs reduce spending
items.summary_en: Women are under pressure from lower pay and reduced affordability on everyday items, which is widening the K-shaped economy and seeing women spending less.

items.title: Hims & Hers 股票大幅上涨，原因是Novo Nordisk放弃了针对Hims & Hers合成减重药的专利侵权案。
items.summary: 诺沃公司(Novo)放弃了对Hims & Hers的专利侵权诉讼，双方达成协议，Hims将销售诺沃的品牌药物。
items.title_en: Hims & Hers shares surge after Novo Nordisk drops patent infringement case over compounded weight loss drugs
items.summary_en: Novo dropped its patent-infringement case against telehealth provider Hims & Hers after the companies agreed that Hims would sell Novo's branded medicines.

items.title: 在线年龄验证工具在美国广泛应用以确保儿童安全，但成年人却被监视

items.title_en: Online age-verification tools spread across U.S. for child safety, but adults are being surveilled
items.summary_en: New age-verification laws and tools are designed for child safety on social media and the internet, but adults are in the crosshairs, say privacy experts.
